modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Measure analog inputs relative to the local `vss` rail and normalize by the current local supply span. Let `span = V(vdd, vss)` and treat the row as valid only when `V(en) > vth` and `span_min <= span <= span_max`. If `span` is below `0.05 V`, use `0.05 V` as the normalization span. Define `clip01(y)` as `y` limited to the range `[0, 1]`, `x0..x3 = clip01((V(inN) - V(vss)) / span)`, and `c0 = clip01(V(ctrl0) / vhi)`.

Initialize the accumulator state and all observables to `0 V`. On a rising edge of `clk` or on reset assertion, clear the accumulator and all observables when `rst` is high or the row is not valid. Otherwise compute `aux = clip01(abs(x0 - x1) + 0.35 * c0)`, update `acc = clip01(0.62 * acc + 0.32 * aux)`, drive `out = vhi * acc`, assert `flag = vhi` when `acc > 0.58`, otherwise drive `flag = 0 V`, and drive `metric = vhi * aux`. Hold the last observable values between update events.

title: Deterministic Energy Accumulator
